Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Paul Cirangle To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PAUL CIRANGLE's Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories And For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Complete responses, without objections, due to be served within 10 calendar days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $695. Enforcement of sanctions is stayed. If Defendant serves timely, complete, Code-compliant, and objection free responses to interrogatories, the sanctions will be waived.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Paul Cirangle For Order That The Truth Of Any Matters Specified In The Requests For Admission Be Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PAUL CIRANGLE's Motion For Order That The Truth Of Any Matters Specified In The Requests For Admission Be Admitted And For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to deem admitted GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Sanctions are mandatory. CCP 2033.280(c). Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $1,042.50.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs First Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PAUL CIRANGLE's Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's First Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Complete responses, without objections, due to be served within 10 calendar days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $1042.50, but enforcement is stayed. If Defendant serves timely, complete, Code-compliant, and objection free responses to requests for production, and produces the responsive documents, the sanctions will be waived.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Defendant Justin Stearman'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint As To Request For Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT JUSTIN STEARMAN'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT AS TO REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently stated.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JUSTIN STEARMAN's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Justin Stearman's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5. That law requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" memorialized in a declaration before a motion to strike may be filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. Stearman's response to the complaint is now due by Feruary 24, 2022.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Defendant Justin Stearman'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint As To Request For Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Continued To Feb-24-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Defendant Justin Stearman'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint As To Request For Punitive Damages is continued to February 24, 2022. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of filings in support of this motion no later than February 10, 2022 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
